title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Granules India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Granules India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
